query: NHTSA petition outcome Tesla 2017-2023 Model 3 Model Y headlight recall

mako.raw:
{"query":"NHTSA petition outcome Tesla 2017-2023 Model 3 Model Y headlight recall","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1857,"verdict":null,"extra_info":{"type":"featured_snippet","text":"NHTSA in 2022 rejected a petition to ⁠require ​a recall for vehicles using LED headlights ​including some Tesla Model 3, Ford Bronco, and Rivian R1T motor vehicles. The petition had ​argued they caused excessive glare.1 day ago"},"results":[{"url":"https://www.teslarati.com/tesla-fix-big-problem-old-headlights-nhtsa-says/","title":"Tesla has to fix a big problem with its old headlights, NHTSA says","content":"Tesla had a petition protesting a recall to fix a potential issue with 2017-2023 Model Y and Model 3 vehicles’ headlights was denied, as the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) disagreed with the company’s opinion of things.
Tesla then petitioned for an exemption from the fix, which violated FMVSS No.
108 (40 CFR 571.108), arguing that the “noncompliance is inconsequential as it relates to motor vehicle safety.
Tesla argued it was inconsequential and did not require a recall. pic.twitter.com/m8Jmm1teLL
The NHTSA disagreed, stating that Tesla’s conclusion that the headlights do not increase any risk was not an opinion it shared.
Accordingly, Tesla’s petition is hereby denied, and Tesla is consequently obligated to provide notification of and free remedy for that noncompliance under 49 U.S.C.
Tesla also argued at some points that the headlights had not been deemed responsible for any complaints, accidents, or injuries related to the noncompliance.
Transaction number 202612350 listed Tesla and SpaceX frontman Elon Musk as the acquiring party and CF APR Super Holdings LLC as the seller, with New APR Energy, LLC as the acquired entity.
BREAKING: Elon Musk acquires Jacksonville power company APR Energy in a deal valued at more than $1,000,000,000.00.
The NTSB confirmed the driver, not Tesla’s FSD, caused the fatal Texas house crash.
Police also found that Butler’s phone had Google searches including the terms “Tesla FSD not aggressive enough 2026” and “Tesla FSD too timid,” raising serious questions about how he was using the system before the crash."},{"url":"https://www.sahmcapital.com/news/content/us-agency-denies-tesla-petition-to-avoid-recall-fix-over-headlight-issue-2026-07-16","title":"US agency denies Tesla petition to avoid recall fix over headlight issue","content":"WASHINGTON, July 16 (Reuters) - The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration on Thursday said it was denying a 2024 petition filed by Tesla TSLA.O to avoid a recall fix for nearly 20,000 vehicles with headlights that may exceed maximum lighting levels.
Tesla argued the issue was inconsequential to motor vehicle safety and did not require a recall or notification to consumers.
NHTSA said it disagreed with Tesla’s conclusion that there is no increased risk of glare for surrounding traffic or the driver of the vehicle.
The recall covers about 19,900 2017-2023 model year Tesla Model 3 and Tesla Model Y vehicles, NHTSA said."},{"url":"https://www.devdiscourse.com/article/business/3951446-nhtsa-denies-teslas-petition-over-headlight-recall-safety-concerns-persist?amp","title":"NHTSA Denies Tesla's Petition Over Headlight Recall","date":"1 day ago","content":"1 day ago — The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) rejected Tesla's 2024 petition to avoid recalling nearly 20,000 vehicles due to ...Read more"},{"url":"https://money.usnews.com/investing/news/articles/2026-07-16/us-agency-denies-tesla-petition-to-avoid-recall-fix-over-headlight-issue","title":"US Agency Denies Tesla Petition to Avoid Recall Fix Over ...","date":"1 day ago","content":"1 day ago — NHTSA in 2022 rejected a petition to require a recall for vehicles using LED headlights including some Tesla Model 3, Ford Bronco, and Rivian ...Read more"},{"url":"https://static.nhtsa.gov/odi/rcl/2026/RCLRPT-26V283-7135.pdf","title":"Part 573 Safety Recall Report 26V283","content":"May 4, 2026 — The recall population includes certain Model Year (“MY”) 2017 and 2021-2023 Tesla Model 3, 2020- 2023 Model Y, and January 3, 2024,"}]}

Not to be confused with National Transportation Safety Board. National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA). The **National Highway Traffic Safety Administration** (**NHTSA** /ˈnɪtsə/ *NITS-ə*) is an agency of the U.S. federal government, part of the Department of Transportation, focused on automobile safety regulations. The NHTSA is charged with writing and enforcing Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards (FMVSS), regulations for motor vehicle theft resistance, and fuel economy, as part of the corporate average fuel economy (CAFE) system. In 1964 and 1966, public pressure grew in the United States to increase the safety of cars, culminating in the publishing of *Unsafe at Any Speed*, a critique of the motor vehicle industry, by Ralph Nader, a lawyer-cum-activist, and the report prepared by the National Academy of Sciences entitled *Accidental Death and Disability: The Neglected Disease of Modern Society*.","score":0.18639141,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.nhtsa.gov","title":"NHTSA | National Highway Traffic Safety Administration","content":"An official website of the United States government Here's how you know.
